sourceRef: tip:How to explain monthly housing allowance in one minute

slides.headline: Explain Monthly Housing Allowance
slides.body: Master the most-asked student question in one minute.

slides.headline: Understand Your Chapter
slides.body: Every chapter has different rates. Check your SAA letter or regulations.

slides.headline: Identify the Student
slides.body: Verify if the student is an eligible Chapter 33 recipient.
bullets: Cross-reference the student's enrollment with your records

slides.headline: Determine the Rate
slides.body: Use VA Form 22-1999 to find the correct rate.
bullets: Verify the rate for the student's chapter

slides.headline: Calculate the Allowance
slides.body: Multiply the rate by the student's number of dependents and months of enrollment.

slides.headline: Communicate Clearly
slides.body: Use clear, concise language when explaining the allowance.
Learn more with our VASCO training series.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Master the most-asked student question in one minute. Understand your Chapter, identify the student, determine the rate, calculate the allowance, and communicate clearly. Learn more with our VASCO training series. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is 'Determine the Rate' as it could benefit from a more concise headline to match the other slides.
